summaries_zoom.long_summary: Team aligned on Q1 product roadmap. Prioritized feature releases for mobile app and performance improvements. Timeline confirmed for March release.
action_items: Complete mobile app specs by Feb 28

summaries_zoom.long_summary: All team members reported on yesterday's work. No blockers identified. PR review queue has 5 items waiting. Database migration in progress, expected completion today.
TechCorp wants to modernize their legacy system. Scope includes API redesign, frontend overhaul, and data migration. 6-month engagement planned starting March 15.
External audit identified 3 medium-severity issues and 2 low-severity ones. All medium issues need resolution by end of month. Auth implementation review completed with positive feedback.
action_items: Fix SQL injection vulnerability in legacy endpoint
Update CORS policy for new domains

summaries_zoom.long_summary: Design system now has 45 components. Team discussed token system improvements and accessibility standards. Plan to add dark mode support next sprint.
key_decisions: Use CSS custom properties for theming

summaries_zoom.long_summary: Reviewed spending across teams. Infrastructure costs slightly higher than expected due to additional staging environments. Forecast looks on track for overall year-end targets.

summaries_slack.short_summary: Discussion about handling edge cases in form validation
summaries_slack.long_summary: Team discussed best practices for handling validation errors in the new form system. Consensus reached on using toast notifications for client-side errors and detailed feedback for backend validation.

summaries_slack.short_summary: Code review feedback on pagination implementation
summaries_slack.long_summary: Provided detailed feedback on pagination implementation. Suggested refactoring to use custom hook and improving accessibility for keyboard navigation.
Discussed and prioritized work items for next sprint. Focus areas: performance optimization, mobile responsiveness, and bug fixes. Some debate about timeline feasibility.

summaries_slack.short_summary: Design feedback on new dashboard mockups
summaries_slack.long_summary: Positive feedback on dashboard redesign. Minor tweaks requested for spacing and typography. Plans to hand off to dev team next week.
Discussed root cause of yesterday's outage. Identified missing index on frequently queried table. Implemented fix and added monitoring alerts.
Reviewed SEO audit results. Planned content updates for top landing pages. New blog series on best practices approved for Q1 publication.

summaries_jira.long_summary: Add OAuth 2.0 support for user authentication. Includes Google, GitHub, and Microsoft providers. Requires auth service refactoring and database schema updates.
Current API response times averaging 800ms. Target: <200ms. Includes database query optimization, caching layer, and CDN integration.
Implement system dark mode detection and user preference toggle. Update all UI components with dark mode variants. Add persistence to local storage.

summaries_jira.short_summary: Fix memory leak in websocket handler
summaries_jira.long_summary: Identified memory leak in real-time data handler. Affects users with long-running connections. Fix includes proper cleanup and connection pooling.
Convert codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript. Planned in phases: core libs first, then services, then components. Expected 3-month timeline.
Improve API documentation with better examples and interactive playground. Add tutorials for common use cases.
Complete redesign of mobile app following new design system. Improves UX and accessibility. 6-week project.
Implement unit test coverage (target 80%) and e2e test suite. Update CI/CD pipeline to run tests on every commit.
Create email template system and notification preferences. Integration with SendGrid or similar service.
Implement i18n framework. Initially support 5 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese.
